info.name: SPM Red Team — P2/P3 Smoke Tests
info.description:
Smoke tests for P2 (group formation, invitations, tool binding) and P3 (advisor requests, coordinator overrides, sanitization). All credentials come from environment variables — never hardcoded.

Run with Newman:
  newman run SPM-RedTeam-Smoke.postman_collection.json -e SPM-Local.postman_environment.json
